title: 7/11 Mod
description: A mod that adds 7/11 into minecraft.
body:
# [This mod is now apart of the Industrilization mod and will no longer be updated.](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrilization-mod)

This mod adds the convience store 7/11 into minecraft, coming with 4 new items, 5 new blocks, a new mob, and a whole new structure!

# Features
## Seven Elevens
7/11s are a new structure found in most variants of forests, mushroom fields and swamps and contain all of the content added by this mod.
## Mountain Dew
Mountain Dew is a new consumable item found in 7/11s, drinking these will grant you speed and haste 4, at the cost of the chance of giving you a heart attack. These can be bought from the new mobs, 7/11 employees at the cost of one emerald. Trying to buy them without any emeralds in either of your hands won't give you the mountain dew. Also you get to keep the empty bottle.
## Robbery
A secondary way of getting mountain dew is mining the new blocks in the 7/11s called Mountain Dew Shelves. However, these will give you stolen mountain dews instead, and stepping on the 7/11 pressure plates with these in your inventory will activate the security system, summoning 7 to 11 vexes. Yay!
